philosophy: Fusion over Imitation: Mix disparate disciplines.
Emotion First: Design for feeling, not trend.
Content is King: Direct the user's emotion.
Negative Space: Breathing room is luxury.

typography.installation_guide: Import 'Outfit' and 'Public Sans' from Google Fonts in index.css

primary.description: Zinc-950 for primary actions and strong brand presence. Classy and authoritative.

secondary.description: Zinc-100 for secondary buttons and surfaces.

accent.description: Burnt Orange for high-intent conversion signals (e.g., 'Upgrade', 'Live Now').

grid_system.dashboard: Grid Mode B (High Density) - 4-col strict grid.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-zinc-800 shadow-sm rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-base font-medium transition-transform active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-zinc-200 rounded-full px-6 py-4 font-medium
buttons.cta_special: bg-accent text-accent-foreground hover:bg-orange-700 shadow-lg shadow-orange-500/20 rounded-full px-10 py-6 text-lg font-bold

cards.dashboard: bg-white border border-zinc-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200 rounded-xl p-6
cards.feature: bg-zinc-50 border-none rounded-2xl p-8 hover:bg-white hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 group

inputs.style: bg-zinc-50 border-transparent focus:border-zinc-300 focus:bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-zinc-100 rounded-lg h-12 transition-all

motion_and_interaction.philosophy: Micro-interactions are mandatory. No static elements.
motion_and_interaction.hover_states: translate-y-[-2px] or scale-[1.02] on interactive cards.

hero_creative.description: Young woman creator with headphones, focus and professional.
hero_creative.usage: Landing page hero or webinar host profile.

dashboard_user.description: Man smiling while working on laptop.

creator_workspace.usage: Course builder introduction or team section.

abstract_analytics.description: Abstract composition of curved white paper and sphere.
abstract_analytics.usage: Background element for 'AI Insights' or Analytics section.

landing_page_builder.guideline: Maximize canvas area. Use floating toolbars (glassmorphism) to keep focus on content. Use 'Grid Mode A' for templates.
landing_page_builder.visuals: Paper textures, crisp shadows, distinct boundaries between 'Editor' and 'Preview'.

analytics_dashboard.guideline: Use 'Grid Mode B'. White cards on soft gray background. 'Stripe-like' metric summaries. AI insights should appear as 'magic' notifications (e.g., sparkling icon + soft gradient border).
analytics_dashboard.charts: Minimalist. Thin lines. No grid lines on charts if possible. Use tooltips for data details.

lead_management.guideline: Table/List view but highly visual. Use badges for 'High Intent' (Green/Emerald) vs 'Low Intent' (Gray). Avatars for every lead if available.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Tailwind theme colors in tailwind.config.js immediately using the 'Obsidian & Paper' palette.
3. Create a 'Layout' wrapper that handles the Sidebar (Dashboard) vs Full Width (Landing) logic.
4. For the 'Landing Page Builder', do not build a complex drag-and-drop from scratch if too hard; use a 'Block-based' editor approach (Left sidebar: Blocks, Right: Preview).
5. Use the provided Image URLs for ALL placeholder images. Do not leave empty gray boxes.
6. Ensure all buttons have 'active:scale-95' and 'hover' states defined.
8. Use 'Outfit' for all Headings and 'Public Sans' for body text.
universal_guidelines: Use glass-morphism (backdrop-blur-xl) for sticky headers and floating tools.
Z-index hierarchy is key for the Builder interface.
Smooth scrolling (Lenis) recommended for the Marketing Site.
